description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch. The pages job should cache node_modules/, execute npm install -g typescript, then npm install @types/node, run make, and generate public/index.html by listing the public directory (ls -1 public > public/index.html). Finally, publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
